exploration_notes: Found 4 REST storage providers in pkg/registry/ that define both v1beta1Storage() and v1Storage() methods: storage (storage_storage.go), admissionregistration (storage_apiserver.go), authentication (storage_authentication.go), and resource (storage_resource.go). Each provider's NewRESTStorage() method calls these version-specific methods to populate VersionedResourcesStorageMap entries for v1beta1 and v1 API versions. The StorageVersion Manager interface is defined in staging/src/k8s.io/apiserve
